backend/main.mo: Entry point for the Motoko backend actor that composes in blob storage functionality via the MixinStorage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (tutorial mode, enemy types, progressive levels system) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, used for build planning and documentation purposes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes including background, foreground, chart, and sidebar color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell with the page title 'Arcade Hub — Play Classic Games', Google Fonts preconnect hints, and a root div for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router configuration defining all 17 game routes (including the F-19 Flight Simulator) under a shared Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/F19Aircraft.tsx: Three.js React component rendering a detailed 3D stealth F-19 aircraft model using grouped box/cone/cylinder geometries with engine exhaust glow effects.
frontend/src/components/F19AircraftCarri: Three.js React component rendering a 3D aircraft carrier with hull, flight deck, island superstructure, radar mast, and an optional health bar for protect-objective game mode.
frontend/src/components/F19CoinShop.tsx: Renders an in-game coin shop overlay with items like missile refills, fuel upgrades, and engine upgrades, allowing the player to purchase them using coins from their WeaponState.
Defines and renders 3D enemy meshes (ground installations, air patrol, fast jets, armored enemies) in the Three.js scene based on enemy type, including health bars and animated elements.
frontend/src/components/F19Flares.tsx: Renders animated 3D countermeasure flare objects in the scene, with pulsing emissive glow and point lights that fade over the flare's lifetime.
frontend/src/components/F19GameOver.tsx: Displays a styled game-over overlay with a crash reason (terrain, water, or fuel), a mission-failed message, and a restart button.
frontend/src/components/F19HUD.tsx: Renders the flight simulator heads-up display showing speed, altitude, throttle, fuel, score, weapon state, coin balance, target lock status, and level objectives.
frontend/src/components/F19LevelComplete: Shows a mission-complete overlay with final score, coins earned, and objective completion status, along with buttons to proceed to the next level or exit.
frontend/src/components/F19LevelFailedOv: Renders a full-screen overlay displayed when the player fails a mission, showing the failure reason, a contextual pilot tip, and Retry/Menu buttons.
frontend/src/components/F19LevelStartOve: Renders a pre-mission briefing overlay showing level name, difficulty stars, objectives, and enemy threat info with Start and Exit buttons.
frontend/src/components/F19Missiles.tsx: 3D React Three Fiber component that renders individual missile objects (body, nose cone, fins, exhaust glow) and exports a renderer that maps over all active missiles.
frontend/src/components/F19ModeSelect.ts: Renders the game mode selection screen with Tutorial, Campaign Levels (with lock/completion status), and Freeplay options.
frontend/src/components/F19Terrain.tsx: Generates and renders the 3D procedural terrain, ocean floor, airport runway with markings and lights, and airport buildings using React Three Fiber.
frontend/src/components/F19TutorialOverl: Displays a step-by-step tutorial HUD overlay with the current mechanic prompt, progress bar, step dots, and Skip/Exit controls.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Defines the main app layout with a sticky header, desktop and mobile navigation menus linking to all game routes, a main content area, and a footer with attribution.
frontend/src/components/Leaderboard.tsx: Displays a styled local leaderboard for a given game, showing the top 5 scores with rank icons and accent color theming, sourced from the useLocalLeaderboard hook.
Renders a form for players to enter a nickname and save their score to the local leaderboard, showing a confirmation state after submission.
frontend/src/hooks/use1v1Lol3DGame.ts: Implements a 3D 1v1 shooter game hook using Three.js, managing player/bot combatant state, projectiles, build-mode structures, weapons, and difficulty configurations with a game loop via requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/hooks/use1v1LolGame.ts: Implements a 2D canvas-based 1v1 shooting game hook with player/AI characters, platformer physics, collision resolution, shooting, wall placement, and AI behavior logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Provides a React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAmongUsGame.ts: Implements an Among Us-inspired mini-game hook with player movement, task interaction, impostor AI patrolling and kill logic, and win/lose state management on a canvas.
frontend/src/hooks/useF19FlightSimulator: Core game hook for an F-19 flight simulator, exporting world constants, terrain height calculation, TypeScript types for enemies/missiles/flares/weapons/levels, level definitions, and game state logic including enemy AI, weapons, fuel, and progression.
frontend/src/hooks/useFnafGame.ts: Game hook for a Five Nights at Freddy's-style game managing animatronic movement, door/power state, night timer, win/lose conditions, and jumpscare logic using refs for mutable state.
frontend/src/hooks/useFootballBrosGame.t: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Computer Internet Identity authentication, handling login, logout, identity persistence, and delegation validity checks via the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLeaderboard.ts: Hook for a local localStorage-based leaderboard that stores, sorts, and retrieves the top 10 scores per game, supporting both ascending and descending sort order.
frontend/src/hooks/useMinecraftClassic3D: Game hook for a 3D Minecraft-style game defining block types, world dimensions, mob/arrow/inventory types, crafting recipes, and procedural terrain generation using a noise function.
frontend/src/hooks/useMinecraftClassicGa: Empty file with no content or exports.
frontend/src/hooks/useOvoGame.ts: Game hook for a 2D platformer (OvO-style) managing player physics, level definitions with moving platforms/portals/hazards, camera, death/completion tracking, and level progress persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/usePokemonGame.ts: Defines a Pokemon battle game hook with a roster of six typed Pokemon, each with stats and moves, implementing turn-based combat logic including damage calculation, accuracy checks, and battle phase management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file for future backend query hooks; currently empty as leaderboard data is handled locally via localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useRetroBowlGame.ts: Implements a retro-style American football game hook managing game state via refs, supporting play selection (run/pass), aiming, ball throwing, and physics updates for ball, receiver, and defenders on a canvas field.
frontend/src/hooks/useRocketSoccerDerbyG: Provides a Rocket League-style 3D soccer game hook with a large 525×340 field, handling car physics (boost, turning, collisions), ball physics (gravity, restitution, friction), AI logic, and goal detection for a 5-minute match.
frontend/src/hooks/useRocketSoccerLeague: Implements a scaled-down (200×120) Rocket League-style soccer game hook with player/AI car physics, ball simulation, keyboard input handling, boost mechanics, and React UI state synchronization for a 3-minute match.
frontend/src/hooks/useSlopeGame.ts: Implements a slope-runner game hook where a ball rolls down a lane avoiding box obstacles and gaps, with increasing speed, steering via keyboard input, collision detection, and obstacle generation/cleanup.
frontend/src/hooks/useStickmanArchersGam: Custom React hook managing a two-archer turn-based shooting game, including game state, physics for arrows (gravity, collision), AI opponent logic, aim controls, and shoot mechanics.
frontend/src/hooks/useSuperMarioGame.ts: Custom React hook that manages a side-scrolling Mario-style game state, including level layout (platforms, enemies, coins), player physics, and keyboard input handling.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind with a retro arcade dark theme using OKLCH color tokens, and defines neon button and arcade UI component styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AmongUsGame.tsx: React page component rendering an Among Us-inspired canvas game where the player completes tasks while avoiding an impostor, with score submission and leaderboard integration.
frontend/src/pages/F19FlightSimulatorGam: React page component for a 3D F-19 flight simulator using React Three Fiber, composing aircraft, terrain, enemies, HUD, missiles, flares, and various overlay UI components with a smooth camera follow system.
frontend/src/pages/FnafGame.tsx: Implements a Five Nights at Freddy's-inspired survival game rendered on an HTML5 canvas, featuring camera switching, door controls, power management, animatronic AI, and score submission/leaderboard components.
frontend/src/pages/FootballBrosGame.tsx: Empty file with no content or exports defined.
frontend/src/pages/GameLobby.tsx: Renders the main game lobby page listing all available games (Snake, Tic-Tac-Toe, Memory Match, etc.) with styled cards, navigation links, and a leaderboard component.
frontend/src/pages/MemoryMatchGame.tsx: Implements a card-matching memory game with a shuffled emoji deck, flip/match logic, move counter, restart functionality, and score submission with leaderboard display.
Renders a 3D voxel-based Minecraft-style game using React Three Fiber with instanced block meshes, player controls, mob/arrow entities, inventory/crafting UI, and a hotbar.
frontend/src/pages/OneLolGame.tsx: Implements a 3D first-person 1v1 battle arena game using React Three Fiber, featuring weapons, building structures, projectiles, AI combatants, obstacles, and score submission.
frontend/src/pages/OvoGame.tsx: React page component for the OVO precision platformer game, rendering a canvas-based game with UI overlays for idle, playing, death, level complete, and game complete phases, plus mobile touch controls, level selection, score submission, and a leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/PokemonGame.tsx: React page component for a turn-based Pokémon battle game, displaying roster selection, a battle arena with HP bars and battle log, and post-game score submission and leaderboard panels.
frontend/src/pages/RetroBowlGame.tsx: React page component for a retro American football game that renders a canvas-drawn field with QB, receivers, defenders, and ball, driven by the useRetroBowlGame hook, with play selection UI, score tracking, and score submission.
frontend/src/pages/RocketSoccerDerbyGame: React page component for a 3D Rocket League-style soccer game using React Three Fiber, rendering a full 3D field with goal frames, field markings, cars, and a ball, without score submission or leaderboard integration.
frontend/src/pages/RocketSoccerLeagueGam: React page component for a 3D rocket soccer game using React Three Fiber with a chase camera that follows the player car, including boost effects, AI opponent, score submission, and a leaderboard panel.
frontend/src/pages/SlopeGame.tsx: A 3D endless runner slope game using React Three Fiber where a ball rolls down a lane avoiding obstacles, with score tracking, game-over detection, and leaderboard/score submission integration.
frontend/src/pages/SnakeGame.tsx: A classic Snake game rendered on an HTML canvas with neon styling, handling movement, collision, food consumption, score tracking, and post-game score submission to a leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/StickmanArchersGame.t: A canvas-based stickman archery game that draws animated stickman archers with bows and arrows on a neon-styled night background, delegating game logic to the useStickmanArchersGame hook.
frontend/src/pages/SuperMarioGame.tsx: A side-scrolling Mario-style platformer rendered on an HTML canvas with platforms, coins, enemies, a player character, and a scrolling camera, supporting score submission and a leaderboard.
frontend/src/pages/TicTacToeGame.tsx: A two-player local Tic-Tac-Toe game with neon arcade styling that detects wins and draws, highlights winning cells, and allows restarting the game.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens (including neon accents and arcade-specific semantics), border radii, box shadows, and keyframe animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks the current state of the F-19 flight simulator project at version 3, documenting existing features (tutorial mode, four new enemy types, progressive levels system) along with their requirements, architectural notes, and known issues.
